Live proof check

    From real sourcea-boot --json on deploy

    Self-serve walkthrough for agencies

    Run this five-minute flow in your browser — open the console, trigger BLOCK live, export the weekly bundle.

    1. Open the pipeline console — show live outreach, demos booked, and open pipeline. Your client sees activity, not slides.
    2. Run the BLOCK demo — ops-monitor stops a rogue write cold. Point to the signed record clients can check. Security-minded buyers nod here.
    3. Attach the weekly export — HTML or PDF bundle with what ran, what blocked, replay link. That is the handoff artifact that closes deposits.

    What you are watching

    Each beat is a pattern stakeholders care about: evidence before execution, context before paste, verdict before write. The council is not theater — it is how production-ready runs work.

    When you verify this on the page, you are showing what executed last night — without waiting for a calendar invite.

    Verify yourself

    Walk the six-step chain with terminal replay — the same demo strangers run in the browser.
